description: Static GitHub Pages showcase site documenting the Currnt platform (frozen Dec 2024). Astro + Svelte 5 + Tailwind v4 + MDX + Pagefind. Reference-density (ccunpacked.dev) for architecture/domain pages, narrative warmth (maximeheckel.com) for landing/timeline/security. Public portfolio piece and living archive.

userStories.title: Pull Currnt brand assets from production
userStories.description: Deferred: requires interactive `gcloud auth login`. SCP `/platformnew/assets/{css,img,fonts}/` from http02 to `/tmp/currnt-src/assets/` for reference (logo, color tokens). MVP proceeds with palette A 'field notes' without these — they slot in any time.
acceptanceCriteria: /tmp/currnt-src/assets/ exists and contains css/, img/ at minimum
Logo file identified and copied into repo (src/assets/brand/)
userStories.notes: BLOCKED on gcloud reauth. Surface to Q at end.

userStories.title: Create public GitHub repo myascendai/currnt-unpacked
userStories.description: Use `gh repo create myascendai/currnt-unpacked --public` (run via `env -u GH_TOKEN -u GITHUB_TOKEN gh ...` because env tokens override the keyring). No description placeholder; we'll set it from README later.

userStories.title: Scaffold Astro project with full toolchain
userStories.description: In /Users/admin/Projects/currnt-unpacked: `bun create astro@latest .` (minimal/empty template, TypeScript strict, no git init — we'll git init ourselves). Then add integrations: @astrojs/mdx, @astrojs/svelte (Svelte 5), Tailwind v4 (via @tailwindcss/vite), astro-icon. Also add pagefind as a devDependency. Configure astro.config.mjs with site + base for GH Pages. Add LICENSE (PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0) and LICENSE-content (CC-BY-NC-4.0). Add README with project description and license split.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json has astro, @astrojs/mdx, @astrojs/svelte, svelte ^5, tailwindcss ^4, @tailwindcss/vite, pagefind, astro-icon
astro.config.mjs configured with integrations and GH Pages site/base
Typecheck passes (`bun run astro check` or tsc)

userStories.title: Theme system + base layout + nav/footer/theme toggle
userStories.description: Implement palette A 'field notes': ivory `#FAF8F3` light / navy `#0F1419` dark, ochre `#C08F3C` accent. Fonts: Newsreader (display), Inter (UI), JetBrains Mono (code). Implement via Tailwind v4 @theme directive in a single CSS file. BaseLayout.astro with <head>, nav (logo text + nav links + theme toggle + search trigger placeholder), main slot with prose container, footer with license note. ThemeToggle.svelte island handles dark/light with localStorage + system preference, no-flash inline script in BaseLayout.
acceptanceCriteria: src/styles/global.css uses @theme with palette A tokens
Fonts loaded (self-hosted or Google Fonts) and applied
src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro renders nav + main slot + footer
src/components/ThemeToggle.svelte (client:load) toggles dark class on html
Inline no-flash script prevents theme flash on load
Light and dark both look intentional

userStories.title: MDX components: RouteTable, StatStrip, Callout, DormantTable
userStories.description: Create reusable Astro components used inline in MDX. RouteTable renders a typed list of {method, path, handler, notes} as a styled table. StatStrip renders 6 stat tiles for the landing hero. Callout takes a `type` prop (note|warning|dormant). DormantTable renders {feature, area, lastUsed, status} rows. Register all in astro.config.mjs MDX `components` so they're globally available.
acceptanceCriteria: Components have TypeScript prop types via Astro.props interface
MDX globally registers them via mdx integration config or rehype plugin
Renders correctly inside an MDX file

userStories.title: Landing page /
userStories.description: src/pages/index.astro: hero with one-paragraph 'what was Currnt', StatStrip with the 6 headline stats from handoff (15M prospects, 314 tables, 140 GB, 4,591-line worker, 62 cron jobs, 177 email templates, frozen Dec 2024), 'tour the system' CTA section linking to /architecture/ and /domains/, four-tile surface index linking to subpages.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero text + StatStrip + surface tiles all visible
Looks intentional in both light and dark

userStories.title: Architecture page /architecture/
userStories.description: src/pages/architecture/index.astro (MDX): SailsJS monolith + MySQL 5.5 + ES 2.4 + Redis + dispenserd, with a Mermaid system-diagram hero. Sections: app layer, data layer, queue/workers (link to /architecture/dispenserd as future page), observability stack note (otelopscol + fluent-bit on http02). Pull content from recon doc.
acceptanceCriteria: Mermaid diagram renders server-side as SVG (no client JS)
All major architectural components mentioned (app, db, ES, redis, dispenserd, workers, observability)
Numbers and version info match recon doc

userStories.title: Treehouse domain page /domains/b
userStories.description: Define `domains` content collection with schema (letter, title, summary, routePrefixes, headlineFlow, dormantFeatures). Author src/content/domains/b-treehouse.mdx with the Treehouse internal admin content: 33 controllers, 8 pillars, RouteTable of the main /admin/* prefixes (use representative subset from PRD §B), one Mermaid sequence diagram for the headline flow (e.g. SDR contact → board invite). This page defines the pattern for the other 6 domain pages.
acceptanceCriteria: src/content.config.ts (or content/config.ts) defines `domains` collection with zod schema
Dynamic route src/pages/domains/[slug].astro renders the page

userStories.title: Sunset page /sunset/
userStories.description: src/pages/sunset.astro (MDX): table of dormant Currnt features. Pull from handoff: engagement marketplace (no rows since 2023), MetaMask auth, Gnosis Safe payouts, Calendly, Lusha, Zoom, NDA flow, Rev.com transcription. Use DormantTable component. Short prose intro framing why these existed and when they fell out of use.
acceptanceCriteria: DormantTable shows all 8 dormant features listed above
Each row has feature name, area, lastUsed (approx), status

userStories.title: Colophon page /colophon
userStories.description: src/pages/colophon.astro (MDX): meta page describing how the site was built. Stack list (Astro + Svelte 5 + Tailwind v4 + MDX + Pagefind, hosted on GH Pages), color/font choices, diagram tooling (Mermaid + Excalidraw), and a one-line acknowledgment that this is a portfolio piece + archive, not affiliated with operating Currnt.

userStories.title: Pagefind client-side search
userStories.description: Run `pagefind --site dist` as part of build (postbuild script). Build a SearchModal.svelte island with a Cmd+K trigger and result list, mounted in BaseLayout. Use Pagefind's UI primitives or its JS API directly. Ensure search index ships to /pagefind/ in dist.
acceptanceCriteria: After build, dist/pagefind/ exists with index files
Searching returns results from indexed pages

userStories.title: GitHub Actions deploy to GH Pages + 404 page
userStories.description: .github/workflows/deploy.yml: on push to main, run on ubuntu-latest with bun setup, `bun install --frozen-lockfile`, `bun run build` (which includes pagefind via postbuild), upload dist as artifact, deploy to Pages via actions/deploy-pages@v4. Configure repo Pages source as Actions. Add src/pages/404.astro for GH Pages 404 handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow has Pages permissions (pages: write, id-token: write)
src/pages/404.astro renders a 404 page using BaseLayout
Push to main triggers workflow; workflow succeeds
All MVP pages reachable from production URL

userStories.title: Wire as submodule under ascend-groups/apps/currnt-unpacked
userStories.description: From /Users/admin/Projects/ascend-groups, run `git submodule add https://github.com/myascendai/currnt-unpacked.git apps/currnt-unpacked`. Commit the submodule pointer + .gitmodules to ascend-groups (do NOT push that commit — that's outside scope). Verify `git submodule status` shows the link.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/currnt-unpacked exists as a submodule in ascend-groups
ascend-groups working tree shows submodule cleanly (no nested .git issues)
